case_title: OPORTUN INC. (FORMERLY PROGRESS FINANCIAL CORP.) VS. RAQUEL BARBOSA PIRES

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC. (FORMERLY PROGRESS FINANCIAL CORP.)

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,585.54 FILED BY OPORTUN INC. (FORMERLY PROGRESS FINANCIAL CORP.) AS TO DEFENDANT PIRES, RAQUEL BARBOSA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-21-2017 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC. (FORMERLY PROGRESS FINANCIAL CORP.) RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PIRES, RAQUEL BARBOSA $1,585.54 PRINCIPAL, $115.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,700.54 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUN-21-2017 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUN-21-2017 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. WITHOUT PREJUDICE AT THE REQUEST OF THE PLAINTIFF. PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC. IS PRESENT. REPRESENTED BY DONNA FLORES ALBERTO, LEGAL COLLECTION SPECIALIST. NO APPEARANCE BY THE DEFENDANT RAQUEL BARBOSA PIRES. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FEE FOR SERVICE: $65.00 SERVED APR-27-2017, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT PIRES, RAQUEL BARBOSA
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-21-2017 - JUDGMENT.
